title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 10.  CAPITAL AREA TRANSIT SYSTEM ACT

§1451.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the Capital Area Transit System Act.

Acts 2005, No. 463, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2006.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 10.  CAPITAL AREA TRANSIT SYSTEM ACT
§1451.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the Capital Area Transit System Act.
Acts 2005, No. 463, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2006.
